channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Oregon Democrats found a way to improve roads. Now their gas tax goes before voters as prices soar
item.description: Appealing to voters' anxieties about the soaring cost of living is central to Democrats' messaging in their hopes of big wins in this year's midterm e...

item.title: Republicans on path to double-digit lead in redistricting fight
item.description: Democrats, who once dominated partisan gerrymandering, are losing the redistricting battle to the GOP ahead of November's midterm elections.

item.title: Newsflash! People Have Actually Never Lived in Harmony
item.description: Ancient cultures were more belligerent than elites would care to admit.

item.title: 'The munitions are depleted': Sen. Kelly warns weapons use in Iran has reduced military readiness
item.description: The United States is less prepared for a major military conflict after depleting its munitions stockpile during the ongoing conflict with Iran, Sen. M...
